description: Shadow-detection enrichment: has_shadow, shadow_count, shadow_vars. Grounded on forgeql-pub.frozen — Rust source shadowing (multiple files) plus a C/C++ fixture multi-shadow function.

cases.name: shadow_count_max
cases.fql: FIND symbols WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE has_shadow='true' WHERE shadow_count=2 LIMIT 10

cases.name: shadow_in_rust_guard_utils
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/ast/enrich/guard_utils.rs' WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE has_shadow='true' ORDER BY line ASC LIMIT 10

cases.name: shadow_in_rust_query
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/ast/query.rs' WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE has_shadow='true' ORDER BY line ASC LIMIT 10

cases.name: negative_no_shadow_in_rust
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE has_shadow='true' LIMIT 5
